title: how to get monetized on youtube in 2026 (step by step)
description:
How do you get monetized on YouTube in 2026? In this video, we explain the exact YouTube Partner Program requirements you need to hit to start earning money from your channel.
We cover the subscriber and watch hour thresholds for fan funding features like Super Thanks, channel memberships, and tipping, as well as the higher requirements for YouTube ad revenue. We also explain the content guidelines your videos need to follow and how to check your monetization progress in YouTube Studio.
If you're a new YouTuber wondering how to make money on YouTube, how many subscribers you need for monetization, or how the YouTube Partner Program works, this video breaks it all down.
